siteResource.name: string
siteResource.pages_count: integer|null (only when pages relationship is loaded)

siteSchemaEndpoints.update: PUT /api/v1/sites/{site}/schemas/{type} - Expects { data: array }, returns SiteSchemaResource

toggleDefaultEndpoint.toggleDefault: PATCH /api/v1/sites/{site}/toggle-default - Returns { message: string, data: SiteResource }

schemaEndpoint.getSchema: GET /api/v1/seo/schema?site={siteId|domain} - Now supports per-site schemas from site_schemas table with fallback to settings table
